title: rosa glutinosa subsp. sicula
intro: Rosa glutinosa subsp. sicula is a subspecies of shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Rosa glutinosa subsp. sicula has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
